- [yehlincho/absolute-stability-predictor](https://github.com/yehlincho/absolute-stability-predictor) — ⭐ 26 · `Jupyter Notebook` · Science — This repository contains code and models for accurately predicting the absolute stability of small protein domains. - [Peregrine123/ROPD\_official](https://github.com/Peregrine123/ROPD_official) — ⭐ 26 · `Python` · Training — This repository contains the official code implementation for the ROPD (Rubric-based On-Policy Distillation) method. - [eddyhkchiu/V2V-GoT](https://github.com/eddyhkchiu/V2V-GoT) — ⭐ 25 · `Python` · Robotics — This repository contains the official code for the "V2V-GoT" paper, which proposes a novel approach for vehicle-to-vehicle cooperative autonomous driving. - [sharifnassab/Intentional\_RL](https://github.com/sharifnassab/Intentional_RL) — ⭐ 23 · `Python` · Training — This repository implements "intentional updates," a novel approach for streaming reinforcement learning that addresses instability issues encountered with standard step sizes when learning from continuous experience streams. - [ShirleyMaxx/REST3D](https://github.com/ShirleyMaxx/REST3D) — ⭐ 22 · 3D — REST3D is a project that generates visually consistent and physically stable interactive 3D scenes using just a single casual image as input, effectively reconstructing 3D environments from 2D data.
